steps.title: Population after the first two weeks
steps.content:
Initial population is 950 bees. For the first two weeks the increase is 130 bees per week.
Population after week 2: $$950 + 2 \times 130 = 1210$$ bees.

steps.title: Population after week w (>2) and remaining needed
steps.content:
For week w > 2, there are (w-2) additional weeks each adding 170 bees.
Population at end of week w: $$1210 + 170(w-2) = 1210 + 170w - 340 = 870 + 170w$$ bees.
Bees still needed to reach the goal of 2,450: $$2450 - (870 + 170w) = 1580 - 170w$$.
C is correct.
